items.title: From Clingan to Gobert to Holmgren, Devin Vassell has been blocking shots by 7-footers throughout the playoffs.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
From Clingan to Gobert to Holmgren, Devin Vassell has been blocking shots by 7-footers throughout the playoffs.

But he's never exhibited the kind of emotion he showed after rejecting Holmgren at the rim with 2:32 left.

No surprise, though. He took Game 5's loss hard after a rare sub-part outing.
